location: Defeat Hoarah Loux, Warrior — the second phase of the Godfrey, First Elden Lord fight at the Elden Throne in Leyndell (fought once the capital has become the Ashen Capital) — then trade the Remembrance of Hoarah Loux to Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold to receive the axe.

source.name: Hoarah Loux, Warrior (2nd phase of Godfrey, First Elden Lord)

tactics: Only reachable after ringing both Great Bells and progressing far enough that Leyndell has turned to ash; you first fight Godfrey's golden illusion, who transforms into the bare-fisted Hoarah Loux partway through
Hoarah Loux grapples and throws huge poise-breaking punches, and his Regal Roar war cry unleashes an unblockable shockwave — dodge through it rather than blocking
The axe itself only arrives after you carry the Remembrance back to Roundtable Hold and pick it over the alternate reward (Hero's Rune) at Enia's shop
lore: Once carried by Godfrey during his march across the Lands Between as First Elden Lord, the axe was broken in that campaign; it stands as a symbol of the discipline he held to even after his exile and transformation into the savage warrior Hoarah Loux.

builds.name: Quality colossal strike build
builds.why: Even D/D scaling across Strength and Dexterity, plus a two-handed Regal Roar buff, make it a solid stance-breaking pick for a balanced quality character.

builds.name: Buff-stacked burst build
builds.why: Regal Roar's temporary attack boost stacks with buffs like Golden Vow or Flame Grant Me Strength for high-damage burst windows against bosses.
